title: Pre-filling your private health insurance tax offset details

content_blocks.text: The pre-filing service will enable you to download your private health insurance tax offset details directly into e-tax .

items: maximum claimable tax offset (after premium reductions) (G)
the amount of rebate received from Medicare.

content_blocks.text: This information will assist in the completion of item T5 .

If the pre-filing system is unavailable, e-tax cannot pre-fill your tax return for you. You can either enter your details manually or try to use the pre-filling service later. For details about when the service may be available again, see Pre-filling initiatives - e-tax.
Changing private health insurance tax offset details
You can manually change any of the pre-filled details in the table provided.
Viewing or printing private health insurance tax offset details

You can view and print the details that are pre-filled into e-tax by selecting File in the Menu Bar and then choosing 'Preview/Print' or by clicking Printing in the Navigator . Select 'Private health insurance tax offset details' in the 'Downloaded data' section and select Preview or print .
If you disagree with the pre-filled private health insurance tax offset information
If you disagree with or you have any question about the pre-filled private health insurance information, see your private health insurance statements or contact your private health insurer.

rows: Where to go next continue to question T6 Education tax refund return to main menu Tax return for individuals instructions , or go back to question T4 Australian superannuation income stream .

content_text:
The pre-filing service will enable you to download your private health insurance tax offset details directly into e-tax .
The pre-filled details will include:
- type of cover
- health insurer ID
- membership number
- maximum claimable tax offset (after premium reductions) (G)
- the amount of rebate received from Medicare.
This information will assist in the completion of item T5 .
If the pre-filing system is unavailable, e-tax cannot pre-fill your tax return for you. You can either enter your details manually or try to use the pre-filling service later. For details about when the service may be available again, see Pre-filling initiatives - e-tax.
## Changing private health insurance tax offset details
You can manually change any of the pre-filled details in the table provided.
## Viewing or printing private health insurance tax offset details
You can view and print the details that are pre-filled into e-tax by selecting File in the Menu Bar and then choosing 'Preview/Print' or by clicking Printing in the Navigator . Select 'Private health insurance tax offset details' in the 'Downloaded data' section and select Preview or print .
## If you disagree with the pre-filled private health insurance tax offset information
If you disagree with or you have any question about the pre-filled private health insurance information, see your private health insurance statements or contact your private health insurer.
Where to go next continue to question T6 Education tax refund return to main menu Tax return for individuals instructions , or go back to question T4 Australian superannuation income stream .
